ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "ISO_A3" TEXT /* ISO A3 code of the country */,
  "ISO_A2" TEXT /* ISO A2 code of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 cases in the country */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 deaths in the country */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate in the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the policy type (e.g., Health, Economy) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the policy type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enforcers" (
  "enforcer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enforcer */,
  "enforcer_name" TEXT /* Name of the enforcer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the enforcer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the enforcer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the enforcer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the enforcer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the enforcer data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enforcer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_levels" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance level */,
  "compliance_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance level */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Description of the penalties associated with the compliance level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the compliance level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_mechanisms" (
  "travel_mechanism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel mechanism */,
  "travel_mechanism_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel mechanism */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the travel mechanism */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the travel mechanism was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_mechanism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_countries" (
  "target_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target country */,
  "target_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the target country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the target country */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 cases in the target country */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 deaths in the target country */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate in the target country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the target country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the target country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_levels" (
  "geographic_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic level */,
  "geographic_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geographic level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the geographic level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geographic_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_regions" (
  "target_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target region */,
  "target_region_name" TEXT /* Name of the target region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the target region */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 cases in the target region */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 deaths in the target region */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate in the target region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the target region data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_provinces" (
  "target_province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target province */,
  "target_province_name" TEXT /* Name of the target province */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target province */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the target province */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 cases in the target province */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 deaths in the target province */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate in the target province */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the target province data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_cities" (
  "target_city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target city */,
  "target_city_name" TEXT /* Name of the target city */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target city */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the target city */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 cases in the target city */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 deaths in the target city */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate in the target city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the target city data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "who_whats" (
  "who_what_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each who or what */,
  "who_what_name" TEXT /* Name of the who or what */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the who or what */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the who or what data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("who_what_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy being updated */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the update record */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the update record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)
